title: Rubio says Iran was ‘playing’ US in negotiations
fullText: NewsFeedUS Secretary of State Marco Rubio defended joint US-Israeli strikes on Iran, saying “the world will be safer” if Tehran doesn’t have access to nuclear weapons. He says President Trump made the decision to strike because Iran was ‘playing’ the US in negotiations.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio defended joint US-Israeli strikes on Iran, saying “the world will be safer”.
